meta.title: Future Visions (AI Film)
meta.description:
Special thanks to my Patreon supporters for empowering me to bring this film to life. 
❤️Your support made it all possible❤️.

The entirety of the visual and auditory content you are about to experience in this film was created using GENERATIVE ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE technologies. 
The conceptualization, narrative structure, and post-production assembly of all ai-generated elements are the product of HUMAN creative direction. 
We present this as a new form of cinematic expression, a unique genre that stands apart from, yet does not seek to replace, traditional filmmaking

↪ Join the Nobodies Collective:
https://www.patreon.com/NobodyandTheComputer

↪ contact me: 
nobodyandthecomputer@gmail.com
https://www.instagram.com/nobodyandthetapes/
https://twitter.com/NobodyComputer



Veronica, a famous singer and composer, faces crippling writer’s block. 
After borrowing a mysterious television from a friend, her reality begins to unravel. 
As strange broadcasts and futuristic visions flood her screen, Veronica is pushed to the edge, questioning the cost of technology and creativity in a world on the brink of chaos.
